_readme: ⚠️  REQUIRED STEP — replace REPLACE_WITH_REAL_RAILWAY_URL_BEFORE_DEPLOY with your actual Railway service URL before running 'vercel deploy'. The deploy will route all /api/* calls to a broken URL if you skip this.
Replace YOUR_RAILWAY_BACKEND_URL below with your actual Railway service URL.
Vercel does not support env vars in rewrite destinations, so this must be
a literal URL. Update it whenever your Railway service URL changes.
After editing, also set VITE_API_URL='' in Vercel environment variables
so the frontend routes all /api/ calls through this proxy.
